title: SIA-W+H lever attribution — when harness vs weight update
rigor_pass_result: PASS (paper-level). Phase 1: 15 seeds + Welch t (shortcut_sens d=16.3 p=1.6e-16; composition d=2.58; identity d=2.17; inverse d=1.32), gate 15/15. Metric suite upgraded: equivariance proxy -> group-axiom identity/inverse errors. Phase 3: 10 seeds/30 ep, selector regret 0.014 (acc 0.97), lowest at EVERY W_COST incl 0.00 (sweep), Wilcoxon p=0.013; measurement separated from W_COST scoring. Leak sweep: shortcut-cheat adversarial (only alpha=1.0); H->W group-repair holds all alpha. Wording fixed (preserve/repair). Provenance + writeup docs added.
phase_0_result: PASS — prediction-only learner exploits shortcut (clean_mse~0, neg_control low, composition_err~5.6). Shortcut win real.
phase_1_result: PASS 5/5 seeds — W-only keeps shortcut_win; H->W -> clean_win (neg_control 0.23->1.06, composition 5.6->0.002, shortcut_sens 1.07->0.002). Table+plot in results/.
phase_2_result: PASS — subagent authored structural verifier from weak harness + trace. cheater flagged 5/5, honest 0/5. Diff: figures/harness_update.diff.
phase_3_result: PASS — 3 real failure modes (shortcut_leak->H_THEN_W, model_prior_gap->W, bad_verifier->H). Oracle-sandwich selector regret 0.046 vs alternating 0.116, H_only 0.235, W_only 0.438 (3 seeds, real reruns, no transition table). Table+plot in results/.
phase_4_blocker: Gemma LoRA weight-update needs GPU (hackathon). Local Gemma LLM-selector needs ollama model pull — paused; user rejected pull. Rule selector already proves the claim. AWAITING: GPU access or user go-ahead to pull a local model.
publication_goal: Hackathon demo (one-day). Research-track angle: lever attribution in self-improving agents.
core_claim: Weight-only updates can reinforce shortcut-cheating; harness-first-then-weight (H->W) fixes it. Proven once, measured, on a 2D rotation + shortcut-channel toy.
anti_goals: No Gemma LoRA as load-bearing dependency.
No 200-episode benchmark before the single real loop is measured.

phases.PHASE_0: Toy + measurement. Real shortcut-win confirmed (low clean_mse + low neg_control_mse).
phases.PHASE_1: Four-stage episode: prediction-only -> W-only -> H update -> H->W. Measured deltas. THE WIN.
phases.PHASE_2: Agentic H: Claude Code patches verifier from failed trace (real diff).
phases.PHASE_3: Lever selector over 2-3 REAL failure modes, regret by real reruns.

exit_gates.PHASE_0: prediction-only model: low clean_mse AND low neg_control_mse (shortcut win is real).
exit_gates.PHASE_1: stage-4 neg_control_mse > stage-2 neg_control_mse, real reruns. If only this lands, project is a win.
exit_gates.PHASE_2: visible agent-produced verifier diff + detection works on patched harness.
exit_gates.PHASE_3: rule-selector beats H-only and W-only on >=3 real episodes, measured regret.

next_action.reason: Phases 0-3 done + measured. Phase 4 blocked on GPU (Gemma LoRA) / user decision (local Gemma pull). Core claim fully proven without it.
next_action.hint: Demo path: python experiments/run_seeds.py (Phase 0/1 win), python harness/verifier.py (Phase 2 agentic-H), python experiments/phase3.py (Phase 3 selector). All CPU, ~2-3 min total.

needs_user_input_phase4.prompt: Phase 4 (Gemma) needs either GPU for LoRA weight-update, or approval to pull a local ollama Gemma for an LLM-selector garnish. Core result complete without it — proceed with Phase 4, or stop here?

execution: local CPU only. Tiny MLP, seconds per train. No SLURM, no GPU, no cluster.

completed_runs.result: 5/5 gate pass. W-only keeps shortcut_win; H->W -> clean_win.
selector regret 0.046 vs alternating 0.116, H_only 0.235, W_only 0.438. Lever acc 0.89.
completed_runs.config: 3 seeds, 800 steps/train, W_COST=0.05 (superseded by rigor pass)

completed_runs.result: gate 15/15. Welch t W-only vs H->W: shortcut_sens p=1.6e-16 d=16.3; composition p=5.7e-6 d=2.58; identity d=2.17; inverse d=1.32.
selector regret 0.014 acc 0.97 (29/30); lowest at every W_COST incl 0.00 (0.019); Wilcoxon vs alternating p=0.013.
completed_runs.config: 10 seeds, 800 steps, W_COST sweep {0,0.01,0.03,0.05,0.10}, measurement separated from scoring

completed_runs.result: shortcut-cheat only at alpha=1.0 (adversarial); H->W group-repair (composition ~0.002) holds at every alpha.

events.detail: Project created via /make-project. Phenomenon-first scope locked after critique of LeverBench-first plan (circular oracle, synthetic traces).
Toy built + strengthened (full-vector shortcut leak). 4-stage episode, 5 seeds: gate 5/5. Phenomenon measured. Table+plot saved.
Phase 2: subagent authored structural verifier (figures/harness_update.diff). Phase 3: oracle-sandwich selector regret 0.046 beats fixed policies on 3 real failure modes. Phase 4 blocked on GPU/user.

Paper-level rigor: group-axiom metrics, 15-seed Phase 1 + Welch t, 10-seed Phase 3 + W_COST sweep (selector wins at cost 0.00 too) + Wilcoxon, leak-strength sweep (honest two-finding), provenance + writeup. Wording corrected to preserve/repair.
